description: Late letter in Judaeo-Arabic 5565 AM (1804/05 CE) to Merkado Karo [of Karo y Frances & Company], from Avraham Haman and Gavriel Ḥefez. Information from Wagner, Linguistic Variety of Judaeo-Arabic, 24. Goitein's attached transcription belongs to a different shelfmark.
tags: Karo y Frances, Avraham Haman, Gavriel Hefez, Haman & Hefez, Late JA, 19th c
